news.title:
ICRA places InterGlobe Aviation's long-term ratings on watch with negative implications, citing geopolitical risks in West Asia.

news.title:

news.title:
IndiGo runs 252 weekly Middle East flights from Mar 16-28, including 126 to/from Saudi, 28 Oman, 98 UAE.

news.title:
India's market remains expensive despite valuation decline from West Asia crisis; PE ratio higher due to strong corporate balance sheets.

news.title:
